subject: [PATCH v2 19/21] nfsd: restore rq_status_counter to even on all nfsd_dispatch() exit paths

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch restores the rq_status_counter to an even value on all exit paths of nfsd_dispatch(), ensuring that a lockless reader can detect concurrent mutations in request fields. The counter is initially set to an odd value when a request is decoded, and then reset to an even value after processing. However, previous code only restored the counter to an even value on the fully successful path, leaving it stuck at an odd value on other paths. This patch adds a helper function to advance the counter to the next even value and calls it on every return path that follows the initial odd-valued store. The decode-error path is left untouched as it occurs before the counter is set odd.
